notes: OpenApp remains the correct comments launch method and is kept as the baseline.
Added /debug/register-post endpoint to register fresh channel posts into ak_posts when they did not reach the bot webhook.
The post picker uses PostgreSQL ak_posts, not the legacy JSON store, so fresh posts must be registered there.
Growth CTA remains disabled through targeted growthLeadCard-only patch.
Silent menu callback fix remains active to suppress native MAX toast notifications such as 'Открыто'.
